name: Storm Warden
xp_description: Gain 1 XP each time your Battalion's damage overflows into an opposing Back Line during the Siege Phase.

levels.name: Stormline Drill
levels.description: During Siege, your Front Line Units gain +1 Might.

levels.name: Static Surge
levels.description: Once per Siege Phase, when you cause overflow, gain 1 Magium.

levels.name: Eye of the Storm
levels.description: Once per Siege Phase, pay 1 Magium to give one of your Front Line Units +2 Might until end of phase.
